name: Golden path: phishing click drives training, monitoring uplift, and closed accountability
description: People-centric golden path suited to CIO/CISO storytelling: voluntary user signals are correlated against awareness programs, deterministic policy decisions route micro-training and monitoring enhancements, and the organization closes with measurable lift in simulated click-through avoidance—no harvested credentials.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Employee uses corporate reporting control to flag a suspicious payroll-themed message; SecureWatch normalizes the report into a positive security culture signal.
URL maps to a benign demo landing host; risk engine still elevates training debt because similar themes trend in industry feeds (Fixture SOC Intel).
Micro-learning module assigned with optional manager digest; completion tracked to HRIS-friendly summary fields (synthetic).
Mail gateway / browser policy simulation adds heuristic for payroll-themed BEC patterns; alerting tuned to suppress noise while widening coverage windows.

payload.title: DEMO: BEC-themed engagement correlated to workforce segment (synthetic)

events_emitted.headline: Psychological safety preserving signal captured
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Leadership KPIs emphasize willing reporting—not punishment metrics—in demo narrative.

events_emitted.headline: Closed loop: Training + telemetry uplift packaged
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Dashboard shows completion rate and tightened detection rulesets as paired outcomes.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: User-report pipeline drives calibrated training nudges and leadership digest.
Monitoring uplift and playbooks tightened for BEC heuristic coverage.

expected_remediation.summary: Complete targeted phishing-resilience curriculum slice, widen BEC detection heuristics, publish executive summary emphasizing culture metrics.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Send adaptive training assignment with SLA based on segmentation rules.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: HR and Legal confirm messaging avoids punitive optics while maintaining accountability narrative.

expected_final_report.title: Workforce resilience briefing — phishing signal converted into measurable uplift
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: We rewarded proactive reporting with fast feedback loops: targeted education shipped in hours, BEC-style monitoring tightened without alert fatigue spikes, and the board sees culture metrics alongside technical coverage—articulated as shareholder-friendly operational resilience.

golden_path_demo.executive_timeline_summary: Under an hour from report ingestion to deterministic routing; within the business day awareness and SOC surfaces move in tandem so leadership hears one coordinated narrative—employees helped, tooling improved.

expected_database_outputs.business_outcome: Demonstrates BEC-theme engagement tied to personas and remediation states.
Immutable record mapping policy decisions to outbound comms stubs.
Demonstrates calibrated alerting uplift with documented rollback metadata.
Optional temporary risk acceptance objects if business rejects aggressive filtering (none in demo).

expected_dashboard_summary.headline: Employees + automation — dual-track resilience investors can cite
kpis: Reporting culture index (voluntary phishing reports vs headcount segmentation)
BEC-aligned detection fidelity delta post-tuning (precision/recall stubs)
Noise ratio trend for analogous campaigns (SOC satisfaction proxy)
Board KPI pack auto-generated completeness score
expected_dashboard_summary.narrative: Dashboards juxtapose humane metrics (education velocity) with SOC metrics (detection deltas) so growth investors perceive both efficacy and disciplined automation.
